retry_reason: The put operation always executes and always succeeds; retrying would be meaningless and could cause a double-free.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases a reference on the eviction fence stored in the eviction fence manager. It is called during teardown to decrement the fence's reference count. After this call, the fence pointer in evf_mgr must not be accessed again, as the put may trigger object destruction if the count reaches zero. The caller must ensure evf_mgr is valid and that no further reference (other than the one being released) exists.

judge.reason: The function's sole purpose is to call dma_fence_put on a member pointer, which decrements the reference count. No other logic exists.
